text.title: CoT Techniques Procedure
text.summary: Six-step procedure to pick, wire, and gate an advanced CoT pattern.

step.name: measure-baseline
step.action: Run zero-shot CoT on ≥50 cases; record accuracy + cost.

step.name: pick-pattern
step.action: Map failure mode to pattern: random errors → self-consistency; sequential dep → least-to-most; branching choice → ToT; format issues → few-shot CoT.
step.decision-gate: Sign-off by reviewer that mapping is sane.

step.name: wire-runner
step.action: Implement the pattern: few-shot CoT updates prompt; self-consistency uses templates/self-consistency-runner.py; least-to-most chains calls; ToT requires branching code.
step.output: Runner code + integration with the LLM client.
step.decision-gate: Unit test pattern produces expected shape on a known case.

step.name: ab-evaluate
step.action: Run candidate on the same ≥50 cases; record accuracy + per-call cost.
step.decision-gate: If delta_pp < 3 OR cost_multiplier >5x without lift >5pp → decision=revert.

step.name: decide
step.action: Decide keep vs revert. If keep, set the cost_guard in cot-config to 1.2x observed per-call cost.

step.name: log
step.action: Commit cot-config.json + lift-report.md; link in the call-site code; add monitor for cost_guard breach.
step.decision-gate: Alert fires >2x in a week → re-evaluate pattern.
